english_query: how to decide whose good matters and how much
ugf_response:
We must think about how we choose what is good. We want to do things that make life better for people. But we have a hard problem when we must choose between many people. We must decide which person to help and how much help they need. This is a hard thing to do because we cannot help everyone at the same time. We have only so much time and so much stuff to give.

The hard question is how to know how much a person is needed when we must choose. If we have one piece of food and two people feel a great need for food, who gets it? If one person is a child and one person is an old man, who should we help? Some people think we should look at how much good feeling a person can feel in the time they have left. They might say we should help the child because the child has many years of life ahead. They want to make the most good for the most people. This way of thinking says we should count all the good feelings in the world put together.

Other people think this is not the right way. They think every person is special and has the same right to be happy. They say we should not count people like they are just numbers. They might say we should follow a set of ways to act that are always right, no matter what happens later. For them, doing the right thing means following what is right in the moment, even if it does not lead to the most good feelings for everyone. They believe that some things are always good or always bad, and we must not change those things just to get a better end.

There are also people who think we should look at what each person has already done. They might think a person who helps others should get more help than a person who hurts others. This is a different way of looking at what is good. It looks at the person and what they are like. This makes things very hard because it is not easy to know what is really inside a person. We might be wrong about who is good and who is bad. This means we could end up helping the wrong people or hurting the right people. All these ways of thinking show how hard it is to decide what is really the best way to live and act.

english_query: why being good at being a person is like being good at anything else
ugf_response:
To be good at being a person means to know how to live well with other people and how to take care of your own mind and body. Many people think this is something that just happens as you grow up. They think it is different from learning how to play a song on a box of wood and thin metal lines or learning how to build a house. But this is not true. Being good at being a person is just like being good at any other thing that you want to do well.

First, you must think about how we learn to do things. When you want to learn to play a song, you do not just know it at once. You must try it many times. You will do it wrong many times. You will make sounds that are not good. But each time you try, your hands and your mind learn a little bit more. This is how you get better.

Being a person is the same way. You must learn how to speak to others without making them feel bad. You must learn how to stay calm when things go wrong. You must learn how to know what you want. You will not do these things right the first time. You will say things that hurt people. You will feel angry when you should not. You will feel lost. But these are the ways you learn. Each time you do something wrong, you can look at what happened and try to do it better the next time.

Second, you must have a way to see if you are doing well. When you build a house, you can look at the walls. If the walls are not straight, you know you have not done a good job. When you are learning to be a person, you must look at your own heart and your own thoughts. You must look at how other people act when they are around you. If people feel happy and safe when they are with you, you are doing well. If you feel heavy and sad inside, you might need to change how you live.

Third, you must put in the work. You cannot get good at a thing by only thinking about it. You must do it. You cannot get good at being a person by only reading books about it. You must go out and talk to people. You must go out and face the things that make you afraid. You must do the hard work of changing your ways.

In the end, being a person is a thing you learn to do well through work. It is a way of living that you build one day at a time. It takes time, it takes many tries, and it takes a way to see if you are moving in the right way. If you act as if it is a thing you want to become very good at, you will grow.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response:
We see many people who try to help, who give food, who share time, who speak kind words. They do these good things many times, over and over, and they notice that they feel a warm feeling inside. This makes them think about a hard question: does doing good things again and again turn a person into a good person? The question is not easy because it asks what it means to be a good person in the first place.

One group of people say that when a person does good things a lot, the act becomes a way of doing something that you do often. They say the way is like a part of you that gets more strong each time you use it. In this view, the more you help, the more you become a kind and nice person, because the way shapes the way you see the world and the way you act without thinking. They point to the fact that many who keep helping also talk about feeling less only thinking about yourself and more caring, and they think that the feeling shows the change inside.

Another group of people say that the reason you do good may be the key. They ask if you help because you want to look good, because you hope to get something you get back, or because you fear being called bad. If the reason is to get something you get, they say, the thing may look good on the outside but the inside may still be only thinking about yourself. They look at cases where a person helps a lot but later shows mean or makes others feel bad, and they say this shows that the outside things do not always change the inside you.

A third group says that what matters most is how you think about the world. They say that if you think that helping is the right thing, then each good thing is a sign that you are moving toward a right way of seeing things. But they also say you could think the right way without ever doing a single good thing, and still feel that you are on a good path. For them, the inside thought and the outside thing are both parts of the picture, and one does not the same as the other. They say that a person can act kind because it is an idea they follow, but still feel empty inside, while another person can feel kind inside and only sometimes act on it.

All these ideas have reasons that make sense. The way view shows how repeated doing can shape a way of doing. The reason view shows how the hidden want behind a thing can stay the same even if the thing looks good. The thought view shows how the way you see the world can stay not the same from what you do. Because each of these reasons can be true in different cases, the hard question stays open. We can keep looking at many cases, talk with many people, and try to feel inside what feels right, but we may still not have a single answer that works for every person. The question stays a big thought for anyone who wonders how doing good many times can change who they are.

english_query: why being sure about something does not make it right
ugf_response:
A person can feel very, very sure about a thing. They might feel it deep inside their heart or in their head. They might see things that make them think they are right. They might have a lot of things that seem to show their way of thinking is the only way. This feeling of being sure is very strong. It can make a person feel like they have found the truth.

But here is the hard question. Does the way a person feels about a thing change if that thing is true or not? If a person feels all of the ways possible that they are right that the moon is made of a soft white food that people eat, does their feeling make the moon that food? No. The moon is not that food. The feeling does not change what the moon is.

Some people might say that if enough people feel sure, then it must be true. They might think that if a whole group of people all believe the same thing with a lot of power in their belief, that thing becomes real for them. They think that the power of many people believing together can change the world.

Other people will say that truth does not care about how people feel. They will say that truth is something that stays the same whether we know it or not. They will say that a person can be very sure and be very wrong at the same time. They will say that we must look at the things themselves and not at how we feel about them. They will say that being sure is just a feeling in our heads and does not touch the real world.

The problem is that being sure can stop us from looking for more truth. When we think we are sure, we stop asking questions. We stop looking for new things that might show us we are wrong. This is why being sure can be a bad thing. It can make us close our eyes to what is actually happening.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response:
The first idea is that a person does good things many times. This is the part that the person says is true. They say that if you do things that help others or things that are right, you will do them again and again. This part is about what a person does in the world.

The second idea is what the person thinks comes from those things that a person does. They think that doing these things many times will change who you are inside. They think that you will become a good person because of what you have done. They think that the things you do and the person you are are the same thing.

Now we must look at whether the thinking is good. To see if this is true, we must ask if doing a thing makes you the kind of person who does that thing. One way to look at it is that if you do something in a certain way, your mind starts to think in that way too. If you do kind things, you start to feel kind. This makes the thinking seem strong. However, another way to look at it is that you might do a good thing only because you are told to, or because you want something back. In those cases, the thing you did is good, but the person inside is not changing. Because of this, the thinking might not always be the very same as the truth. It is a good guess, but it is not always a true thing.

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response:
Person 1: I ask why we need to think about people we will not see.  
Person 2: We think about them because what we do today can change what they get later.  
Person 1: But how can something we do now change someone we will never see?  
Person 2: When we take care of the earth or the air, the clean air and clean water go on and help all who live after us.  
Person 1: So we should try to give good things now even if we never see the people who use them.  
Person 2: Yes and also we can think about what kind of world we want for the next ones and try to act in a way that makes that world better.  
Person 1: What if my small things we do do not seem to matter?  
Person 2: Even small things we do add up like many water parts become a big river and each part helps the whole.

english_query: why saying something over and over does not make it true
ugf_response:
Person number one: I hear people say the same thing many times. They think if they say it enough, it will become the truth. Is that how it works?

Person number two: No, it does not work that way. Saying something many times does not change what is real. The truth stays the same no matter how many times you say it.

Person number one: But why does it feel like it might be true if I hear it all the time?

Person number two: Our brains are strange. When we hear a thing many times, our minds start to feel like it is right. It becomes easy to think about. We take a feeling of things being easy and think it is the feeling of truth.

Person number one: So my mind is playing a game with me?

Person number two: Yes. Your mind sees something many times and says, this must be true because it is so easy to know. But being easy to know is not the same as being real.

Person number one: If I want to know if a thing is true, what should I do instead of just listening to it?

Person number two: You must look at the world to see if the thing is there. You must find things that show the thing is real. Do not trust your mind just because it feels sure. Trust what you can see and what is actually happening.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know how I can tell when someone is changing what I said to make it sound different.

Person number two: You must listen to the words they say and then look at the words you actually used.

Person number one: How do I know if they are doing this because they want to make me look bad?

Person number two: You can look for when they take your big idea and make it sound small or like it has no weight. They might take a thing you said about one situation and say you meant it for all situations.

Person number one: That sounds hard to see while I am talking. What else should I look for?

Person number two: Look for when they use words that you did not use. If you said you like a thing, but they say you love that thing too much, they are changing your meaning.

Person number one: So if I stay calm and repeat my own words, will that help?

Person number two: Yes. If you say, I did not say those words, it makes them show what they really did. You must keep your own words in your head so you can see when they are not the very same as the words coming out of their mouth.

english_query: how a group can agree on rules that are good for everyone
ugf_response:
A group of people wants to live or work together in a way that is good. To do this, they need to decide on a set of ways to act. These ways are the things everyone must do or must not do. When everyone follows these ways, life is easy and everyone gets what they should. But making these ways is not easy. People have different needs. One person might want more money, while another person might want more free time. One person might want to be the leader, while another person wants to be left alone.

The hard question is how to find the ways of acting that are good for every single person in the group. How do we know if a way of acting is good if some people get more than others? How can we make sure that the group does not hurt the people who are small or have little power? This is a very big problem because it is hard to make everyone happy at the same time.

Some people say we should look at what happens after we make a way of acting. They think we should pick the way that brings the most good to the most people. They say if a way of acting makes ten people happy but makes one person sad, it is still a good way. They believe the whole lot of good is what matters most.

Other people say this is wrong. They say we cannot use people like things to get a good end. They think we must have ways of acting that show we care for every person no matter what. They say that even if a way of acting makes many people happy, it is a bad way if it hurts one person in a bad way. They believe that some things are always right and some things are always wrong, and we must not change them just to make more people happy.

There are also people who say we should look at what we would want if we did not know who we were in the group. Imagine you do not know if you will be the rich person or the poor person, the strong person or the person with little power. If you do not know your place, you will pick ways of acting that are good to everyone, because you might be the person at the bottom. This is a way to find a good way by taking away what we know about our own lives. Each group of people will look at this problem in a different way, and they will keep talking until they find a way to live together.

english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
One: Why do we feel more hurt when we lose a thing than we feel good when we get the same number?  

Two: Our head makes bad feeling big than good feeling.  

One: How does that make us think more about lose?  

Two: When we lose we see what we do not have and that thought stay long in our head.  

One: What about when we get something good?  

Two: When we get we see what we have now and the good feeling may stop soon.  

One: Does this mean we are more want to stay away from lose than to look for get?  

Two: Yes, because the hurt from lose can be big and stay long, while the good from get is often small and may go away fast.

english_query: how the kind of person you are matters more than following rules
ugf_response:
Imagine a place like a school where there is a group of things that everyone says they must do, such as wear the same clothes, be on time, and not talk when a teacher talks. One child in that place is very kind, always helps a friend who fell, shares food, and says sorry when they hurt a feeling. Another child follows the group of things very well but does not help anyone and often looks away when a friend is sad. The first child sometimes breaks the group of things by talking too much or being a little late, but the other child never breaks the group of things. People in the school see both and wonder which one is more important.  

The hard question that comes up is whether the kind of person you are matters more than the group of things you say you must do. Some people think that the group of things keeps the group safe and right, so they say the group of things is the most important thing. Others think that the way a person acts inside, the kind they are, is the real thing that makes a good place, even if they sometimes do not follow the group of things. The question feels hard because both ideas seem to have good parts and both can make a place feel safe or feel warm.  

First, one group of people will answer that the group of things is the best help. They say that if each person follows the group of things, then the group will not have fights, will know what to expect, and will not need to guess what a good person looks like. They may have seen times when a kind person broke the group of things and caused trouble, like when a child ran out of the room to help a friend and left a class without a teacher knowing. For them, the group of things is a way to keep the group safe even if it sometimes stops a kind act.  

Second, another group will answer that the kind of person is the real help. They say that a kind heart will find ways to do what is right even when the group of things says something else. They point to the first child who helped a friend, saying that the friend felt safe and happy because of that act, not because the child wore the same clothes or was on time. They may have seen times when the set of things was too hard, like when that set stopped a child from speaking up about a problem and that caused hurt.  

Third, the one after the second view tries to put the two ideas together. It says that we should try to follow the group of things because it helps the group run easy, but we should also watch the kind of person and be ready to change the group of things when it stops a kind act. People who hold this view often say that the best place is one where the group of things is a help, not a wall, and where a kind heart can still act.  

In the end, the question stays hard because each answer has a reason. Some people feel safe when the group of things is clear. Some people feel warm when they see a kind heart. The story shows that the kind of person and the group of things both make what we see, and we may need to think about both when we try to make a place that feels safe and warm.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response: First, we must understand what we want to find. We want to know the things about a person that they do not show to the world. Second, we must look at what they do every day. We watch how they act when they think no one is looking. Third, we look at the things they say when they are not trying to look good. We listen for the small things they say that are not the same as what they do. Next, we look at the things they own and the places they go. These things can tell us about what they really care about. After that, we must be very careful not to believe everything we see at first. We must think about why they might want to hide certain things. We must ask if what we see is real or if it is something they made to make us think something that is not true. Finally, we put all these pieces together to see the whole picture of who they are.

english_query: how to decide whose good matters and how much
ugf_response:
When we think about what is good, we must ask a hard question. We must ask which people get to have their good things seen as important. This is hard because every person wants their own good things to be the most important.

First, we must look at how we choose who counts. One way is to say that every person is the same. In this way, you do not pick one person over another. You say that the good of one person is just as big as the good of any other person. This means if you have to choose between helping one person or helping ten people, you look at how much good there is in all. You try to make the whole lot of good as big as it can be for everyone.

Second, we can look at how people act. Some people say we should look at what a person does. We look at the things people do to see if they are good or bad. We then try to make a way of living that follows what we think is good. This way does not just look at the whole lot of good. It looks at whether the things we do are the right things to do.

Third, we can think about what we must do for others. This way says that there are things we must do for people, no matter how much good it brings. For one case, you might say you cannot hurt one person even if it makes ten people very happy. You say that each person has a right to be seen in a certain way.

To decide how much good matters, we must also look at how much we can give. Some people think that a little bit of good for a lot of people is better than a big bit of good for only one person. Others think that we must make sure the person who has the least gets more help first.

There is no easy way to answer these questions. We are always trying to find a way to be good to others. We must think about how our choices hurt or help the people around us. We must try to find a way to be good to everyone in a way that is right.

english_query: the idea that we are all connected and need each other
ugf_response:
Think about a large group of small things that work together to make one big thing. A forest is a good way to see this. The trees do not live all by themselves. They need the ground to hold them. They need the sun to give them light. They need the rain to give them water. They also need the tiny things in the ground to help them eat. If you take away the water, the trees die. If you take away the tiny things in the ground, the trees die. Everything is tied to everything else in a way that we can see.

People are like those things in the forest. We are not alone. We are tied to each other in many ways. Think about the food you eat. You did not make that food yourself. Someone else grew it. Someone else moved it to the place where you live. Someone else sold it to you. You need that person to live. That person needs you to keep the system going.

Think about the clothes you wear. Someone else made those clothes. Someone else made the machines that made the clothes. We all do things for other people, and other people do things for us. This means we are all part of one big group of things that touch each other. If one part of this group breaks, it can hurt the other parts.

When we say we need each other, it means that no person can do everything alone. We have things we are good at, and we have things we are bad at. One person might be good at building houses. Another person might be good at growing food. Another person might be good at making things that help people when they are sick. Because we are all different, we must work together to make sure everyone stays well and happy.

If we act in a way that hurts someone else, we are really hurting the group of things that we all live on. If the group is broken, it is harder for everyone to live. But if we take care of each other, the whole group becomes strong. We are all tied together, and what we do to one part of the group matters to every other part.

english_query: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
ugf_response: First, we must think about how we decide what is right or wrong. We often think that some ways of acting are good and some are ways of acting are bad. One way to find these good ways is to ask what would happen if every person did the same thing. We can look at a way of acting and ask if every person in the world could say yes to it. If every person could say yes to it and still have a good life, then that way of acting is good. If some people would be hurt or would not be able to live well, then we cannot say that way of acting is good. We must look for the ways of acting that every person could agree to follow. This means we do not look at what one person wants, but what all people can accept at the same time. We must find the ways of acting that stay good no matter who is doing them. This is how we find the way to act that is right for everyone in the very same way.

english_query: how we come to trust what other people tell us
ugf_response:
The first thing to look at is the part that the person says is true. They say that we do not see everything that happens in the whole world. We only see a small part of what is going on. Because we cannot see everything, we must listen to what other people tell us about the things we cannot see. This is the starting point for how we know things.

The second thing is what they think follows from that starting point. They say that because we must listen to others, we must find a way to know if the people we listen to are telling the truth. They think that we must have a way to check if the things people say are right or wrong. This is how we build a way to know what is true without seeing it with our own eyes.

The third thing is to look at if the way they think is good. The way they think is good because it starts with a fact that we all know. It is true that we cannot see everything. It is also true that we need to know things that are far away or things that happened before we were born. However, we must be careful. Just because we need to listen to others does not mean that every person we listen to is right. We must also think about how we know if a person is a good person to listen to. If we only look at the fact that we cannot see everything, we might forget to look at the person who is speaking. We must find a way to be sure that the things we hear are true, or we will believe things that are not true.

english_query: how to tell when what someone says gives us a good reason to believe it
ugf_response:
When someone tells you something is true, you must decide if you should believe them. To do this, you should look at a few things. First, you should look at the person who is speaking. Do they know a lot about what they are saying? Have they told you things that were true before? If they are a person who knows much and tells the truth, you might believe them more. If they often say things that are not true, you should be careful.

Second, you should look at the things they use to show that what they say is true. If they say something is true because they saw it with their own eyes, that is a strong way to show it. If they say it because they heard it from someone else, it might be less strong. You must ask if the things they use to show the truth are good or if they are just guesses.

Third, you should look at how well their story fits with what you already know is true. If what they say goes against everything else you know to be true, you should ask for more things that show it is true. If their story fits well with many other true things, it is a thing that has a high chance of being true.

The thing after the third thing, you should look to see if they are trying to make you believe something for a reason that is not about the truth. Sometimes people want you to believe something so they can get something for themselves. If they want you to believe something so they can win or get money, you must be very careful.

Finally, you should see if their story stays the same when you ask more questions. If you ask them about the small parts of their story and the parts do not fit together, then their story is not true. A good story should stay strong even when you look at it with a very deep eye. If you check all these things and the story is still strong, then you have a good reason to believe it.

english_query: the idea that the right thing is usually between two wrong things
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who must make a choice between two ways to act. The first way is bad because it hurts people in a way that is too much. The second way is also bad because it does not do enough to help people. These two ways are at the ends of a line. One end is too much of a bad thing, and the other end is too little of a good thing. Most people think that the best way to act is to find the point in the middle of that line. This is the idea that the good way stays between two ways that are not good.

The hard question is how we can know where that middle point is. If we want to be good, we must know how much is too much and how much is not enough. It is easy to see the ends of the line because they are very bad. It is much harder to find the spot in the middle that is just right. There is no easy way to see it with our eyes. We must use our minds to think about what will happen if we pick one way or the other.

Some people say we should look at what happens after we act. They think we should pick the way that makes the most people feel good and the least number of people feel hurt. For these people, the middle point is the place where all the good things put together are the highest. They try to count the good and the bad to find the best spot. They think this is the only way to be sure we are doing the right thing.

Other people say we should look at what we must do because it is what we should do. They think some things are always wrong, no matter what. They do not care as much about all the good or all the bad put together. They care about following the way things should be. For them, the middle point is not about counting things, but about finding the way that stays true to what is right. They think the middle is found by not going too far in any one way.

There is also a way of thinking that says we should look at how we act. These people think that if we try to be in the middle, we will become better people. They say that being good is a way of living that we learn over time. For them, the middle point is a way to train our own minds to see things well. They believe that by always trying to stay between the two bad ways, we will slowly learn how to see the good way more clearly.

english_query: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
ugf_response: First, we look at the way people live together. We see that people often do things that make others feel bad or hurt. To stop this, we need a way to decide what is good and what is bad. One way to do this is to make a set of things that people must do. We call these things the ways people must act. Now, we look at a special way to make these things. This way says that a way of acting is only good if every person could say yes to it. We must think about what would happen if everyone lived by that way. We must ask if every person, using their own mind, would say yes to it. If a way of acting would make it so that people can not live together, then it is not a good way. We must not pick a way that only helps one person or a small group of people. Instead, we must pick a way that any person could say is right. If we can not find a way that every person can agree to, then we have not found a good way to act. This means we must look for ways of acting that work for everyone, no matter who they are. This is how we find the right ways to live together.

english_query: the idea that the right thing is usually between two wrong things
ugf_response: First, we see that you can have two not good ways that both have parts that can make you feel hurt. Then we think about each part and see that each one can lead to a state that is not good. Next, we look for a way that stays away from the most not good parts of both ways. This new way often sits in the place that is not the first not good way and not the other not good way. When you choose this place you get not as much hurt as if you choose any of the two not good ways. This makes it easy to see the why that the good way is most of the time in the place that is not the first not good way and not the other not good way.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response:
The first idea they say is that if a person does good things many times, that can be seen as real. You can look at a person who helps others, shares, or does kind work again and again and you will see that the way things happen again and again is there.

The second idea they think follows from that is that the many good things a person does will make the person become a good person. In other words, they think that the more often you do a kind or good way, the more you will be a kind or good person inside. They see the idea that one thing can cause another between the things a person does on the outside and the feeling inside the person.

The thinking about this can be good in some ways but it also has the places where it does not work. It is good to notice that a way that happens again and again of doing kind things can help a person grow a way that happens again and again of kind, and that way can make it easier to pick kind ways in the time that comes later. That part of the thinking fits with what we see in many lives. However, the thinking can miss other parts. A person might do good things for show, for a thing that makes a person feel good after, or because they feel they have to, not because they feel good inside. In that case the things a person does on the outside do not always make the person become a kind inside. Also, a person can feel kind inside but sometimes fail to do a kind way because of fear or need. So the idea that the things a person does on the outside always make a person become a kind person is not always true. The thought is helping when it reminds us that doing kind things can shape us, but it is not an idea that says what always happens for every case. It is better to see the idea as something that shows the way, not as the very same idea that always works.

english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response:
Person number one: I have a very big question in my head and it makes my brain feel bad. How can I think about it without getting lost?

Person number two: You must take the big thing and break it into very small pieces. Do not try to eat the whole thing at once.

Person number one: How do I break it?

Person number two: First, you must write down what you think you know to be true. Then, you must write down what you do not know. This makes the big thing look like many small things.

Person number one: What do I do after I have my small things?

Person number two: You look at the first small thing. Ask yourself if it is true. If you cannot say for sure if it is true, you must find more things to help you know. Then you move to the thing after the first one.

Person number one: Does this help me find the answer?

Person number two: It helps you move through the dark. If you go step by step, you will not fall. You will reach the end by walking on small stones instead of trying to fly over a deep hole.

english_query: why a true belief for bad reasons is not the same as knowing
ugf_response:
Person 1: I hear people say that having a real thought that fits how things are, but for a wrong cause, is not the same as to know. Why is that?  
Person 2: When we say we know something, we need two things: a real thought that fits the way things are, and a good cause that leads us to that thought.  
Person 1: So the thought being real is only one part?  
Person 2: Yes, the thought must be real, but if the cause is wrong the thought is still not full know. The good cause shows that we got the thought in a way that usually gives true thoughts.  
Person 1: What do you mean by a good cause?  
Person 2: A good cause is a reason that fits with what we see or with a way that usually gives true thoughts. It is not just a lucky guess or a not true idea that happens to be right.  
Person 1: If the cause is wrong, does that mean the thought could be right by chance?  
Person 2: Exactly. The thought can be right, but because the cause is wrong we cannot say we really know it. We only have a true thought for a bad cause.  
Person 1: So knowing needs both a true thought and a good cause together?  
Person 2: Yes, both parts together make know. One part without the other is not enough.  
Person 1: I see now why a true thought for bad reasons is not the same as knowing. Thank you.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
Imagine you are wearing a pair of glasses with colored glass. If the glass is red, everything you look at will seem to have a red color on it. This is how your mind works when you see something for the first time.

The things you already think are true act like these colored glasses. When you see something new, your mind does not look at it in a way that is completely free. Instead, your mind tries to fit the new thing into the things you already know.

Think about it this way. Suppose you believe that all dogs are bad and will bite you. If you see a new dog walking toward you, you will look for signs that it is mean. You might see it move its mouth and think it is getting ready to bite. You might see it run and think it is coming to hurt you. Because you already have a thought in your head that dogs are bad, your eyes and your mind work together to find things that make that thought feel right.

On the other hand, if you believe that all dogs are kind and want to play, you will see that same dog in a different way. You might see it move its mouth and think it is happy. You might see it run and think it wants to play with you. The dog has not changed at all. The dog is the very same dog in both stories. What changed was the way your mind looked at the dog.

Your mind likes to feel that it is right. It does not like to feel that it is wrong. When something new comes to you, your mind quickly asks, Does this fit with what I already know? If it fits, your mind says, Yes, this is true. If it does not fit, your mind might try to change how it sees the new thing so that it does fit. This happens without you even knowing it.

This means that two people can look at the very same thing and see two different things. One person sees one thing because of what they believe. The other person sees a different thing because of what they believe. We do not see the world as it is. We see the world as we are.

english_query: why the rules should be the same for everyone
ugf_response:
To start, think about a play that many people do. In that play there is a group of things that tell each person what they may do and what they may not do. If some people have one group and other people have a different group, then the play can become hard to do. One person might think they can take a turn that another person thinks is not right. This can cause people to fight, to feel sad, and to stop having fun. When the group of what is right is the same for all people, each person knows what they can do and what they can not do. They can plan their moves, they can trust that other people will follow the same thoughts, and they can feel safe that no one will get extra help just because they have a different group.

Now think about life that we all live in. In life there are many things that we all need to share: ways, water, air, places to work, places to learn. If one person is right to take more of these things than another person, then the person with less may not have enough to stay well or to be able to go to school. This can make the group as a whole less strong, because people who are hurt can not help the group. If the thoughts about what each person may take or do are the same for all, then each person can get the same number of parts of what the group makes, and each person can give back in a way that is the same as what they get.

Also, when we all use the same thoughts about what we must do, we can trust each other more. Trust comes from knowing that the other person is playing by the same thoughts. If we do not know that, we may think the other person will try to break the group, and then we may have to watch them all the time, which uses time and the power to do work that could be used for other good things.

Finally, having the same thoughts for all helps us find a way to fix hard things together. When a hard thing comes up, we can talk about it using the same thoughts, and we can find a way that works for everyone because we all start from the same place. If we each start from a different place, then we may never say yes on a way to fix the hard thing.

In short, having the same group of thoughts that tell us what we may do and what we must not do helps people feel safe, helps the group stay strong, helps us trust each other, and helps us work together to fix hard things. That is why the thoughts should be the same for all.

english_query: the problem where two people could work together but might not
ugf_response:
The first idea is that two people can work together to do a thing. This means that if they join their work, the thing will be done well or it will be done. The second idea is that these two people might choose not to work together. This happens because they might think that working alone is better for them, or they might not trust the other person to do their part. The third idea is that this choice can lead to a bad thing where the work does not get done at all.

What follows from these ideas is that even when working together is the best way to reach what they want, people will often not do it. This is because each person looks only at what is good for them in that moment. They think about what they get if they work alone and then they think about what they get if they work with another. This can lead to a situation where the group gets less than what they could have had if they had just joined together.

The way the person thinks about this is good because it shows how people act when they are not thinking about the whole group. It points to a real problem in how people live and work. However, to see if the whole thought is strong, we must look at why they choose not to work together. If the reason is only about what one person gets, then the thought is strong. If there are other reasons, like not knowing how to work together, then the thought might need more parts to be the very same as what is happening in the real world.

english_query: why different situations need different kinds of good character
ugf_response:
To be a good person is not a thing that stays the same all the time. A good person must change how they act on how things are around them. Think about a person who looks after a small child. For that person, being good means being very soft and very kind. They must be able to wait for a long time without getting mad and give much care. If that same person goes to a fight to keep their home safe, being soft and kind would not be good. In a fight, being good might mean being strong and being hard. If they are too soft during a fight, they might let bad things happen to those they love.

We can see this by looking at different parts of life. First, think about a person who works with many other people to build something big. For this person, being good means giving everyone the same thing and being able to work well with others. They must listen and follow the way things are done. Second, think about a person who must make a choice that will change everything for a whole group of people. For this person, being good means being very careful and thinking about what will happen a long time from now. They cannot just think about what feels good right now.

If a person only has one way of being good, they will fail when the world changes. If someone is always very loud and strong, they will hurt people when they should be quiet and kind. If someone is always very quiet and follows what others say, they will not be able to stand up when something bad is happening. Being a good person means knowing which part of your heart to use at the right time. You must look at the world, see what is needed, and then use the right way of being. To be very good, you must be able to change your ways to fit the world around you.

english_query: why being good at being a person is like being good at anything else
ugf_response:
To be good at being a person means you know how to act well with other people and how to take care of yourself. Some people think this is something you are born with. They think you either have it or you do not. But being good at being a person is just like being good at playing a game or being good at making things with your hands.

First, we must look at how we learn things. When you want to be good at a game, you must look at how the game works. You must see what happens when you do one thing and what happens when you do another thing. You must watch the people who are already good at the game. You see what they do and you try to do the same. Being a person is the same. You watch how people talk. You watch how they show they are happy or sad. You see what makes people feel good and what makes them feel bad.

Second, you must do the same thing many times to get better. If you want to be good at a game, you cannot just watch it once and say you are the best. You must play it many, many times. At first, you will do things that are wrong. This is okay. You learn from the things that went wrong. When you are a person, you will say things that make people mad. You will make choices that make you feel bad. But you learn from these things. Each time you do something that is not right, you learn how to do better the next time.

Third, you must have a way to know if you are doing well. In a game, there is a way to see if you won or lost. In being a person, the way you know if you are doing well is by looking at the people around you and how you feel inside. If people want to be near you and if you feel a deep sense of being okay with yourself, it means you are doing well.

Finally, being good at being a person takes time. It does not happen in one day. It is a long road of learning and doing and doing things that are not right. Just like any other thing you want to be good at, you get better if you keep trying and keep watching and keep learning.

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response:
Imagine you go to a place to buy things. At first, you do not want to spend much money. You have a small part of your money you want to use. But then, something happens. You buy one thing. Then you buy another thing. Now you have given away a lot of money.

A strange thing happens in your head. You start to think that because you have already given away a lot, you should keep spending more. You feel that the money you already gave away is gone and cannot come back. You think that if you stop now, the money you already gave away was a bad thing that should not have happened. But if you spend even more, you feel like you are making a big choice.

This is a bad way to think. It is a way that makes people lose even more money. You might think that spending more will make the first spending seem good. But it does not. The money you spent at the start is gone. You cannot get it back by spending more.

The right way to think is to look at each new thing you might buy. You should ask yourself if you want this new thing right now. You should not ask if this new thing will make your past spending look good. You should only look at what you have now and what you will have if you spend or do not spend. Each time you spend, it is a new choice. Do not let the money you spent before change how you make your next choice. If you do not want the new thing, do not buy it, no matter how much you have already spent.

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response:
Person number one: I have a question. Do we have to care about people who are not here now and who we will never see?

Person number two: That is a big question. I think we do.

Person number one: Why? If I do not know them, and they do not know me, why should I do things to help them?

Person number two: Think about the world as a long line of people. Each person comes, lives, and then goes. We are in the middle of that long line. The people who come after us will live in the world we leave behind.

Person number one: But they are not here. I cannot see them. I cannot feel their bad times.

Person number two: You do not need to see them to know they will feel things. If we make the world bad, they will have bad times. If we make the world good, they will have a better life.

Person number one: So you think the things we do should be for people who are not even here yet?

Person number two: Yes. We should act in a way that makes the world good for everyone in that long line, even the ones we will never meet. We should not take everything for us and leave nothing for the ones who come after us.

english_query: how taking care of others is a kind of work that matters
ugf_response:
Person 1: Why do you say that looking after people is real work?

Person 2: Because it takes a lot of time and power to help others feel safe and well.

Person 1: But some people say it is just love and not a job.

Person 2: Love is the reason we do it, but the doing is hard and needs knowing how to do it right.

Person 1: How does it help the group of people around us?

Person 2: It keeps everyone from getting sick or sad, so the whole group can stay strong.

Person 1: So it is like building a house by fixing the walls?

Person 2: Yes, if the walls are broken, the house falls down, but if we fix them, it stands.

Person 1: That makes me see why this kind of help is so important.

Person 2: It is, because without it, no one would be able to live a good life.

english_query: how to build your own set of rules for making hard choices
ugf_response:
The person wants to tell us how to make a set of ways to pick what to do when things are hard. The first idea is that we must have a way to decide what is right and what is wrong when we cannot know the best way to act. The second idea is that we can make this way by our own hands by looking at what things do. The third idea is that we should look at how our choices change the world and how they touch the people around us.

The person thinks that if we look at the things that happen after we do something, we can find the best path. They think that if doing something makes more good things happen for more people, then that thing is the right one to do. They believe that by using this way of thinking, we can make hard choices without being lost or making bad choices that hurt people.

We must look at if this way of thinking is good. The first part of the thinking is good because it looks at the real world and what actually happens. It is good to care about the good things that come from our ways of doing things. However, the thinking has a problem. The second part of the problem is that it is very hard to know what will happen in the future. We might think a way of doing something is good, but it might cause a lot of hurt later. The third part of the problem is that it is hard to count how much good or hurt is happening. One person might feel very good while another person feels very bad, and it is not easy to say which feeling is more important. Because of these things, the way of thinking might not always lead us to the right answer.

english_query: why counting up good and bad results is harder than it sounds
ugf_response:
We see a group of people look at a set of things that have some good parts and some bad parts. They try to make a number of the good parts and a number of the bad parts. At first it may seem like an easy step: just put a sign for each good thing and each bad thing and then add them up. But when they sit down to do it, they find that the work is not as clear as it first looks.

One reason is that the good and bad parts are not always clear. A thing that looks good at one time may turn bad later, and a thing that looks bad at one time may turn good later. People may also see the same thing in different ways. One person may say a thing is good because it helps them, while another may say it is bad because it hurts someone else. Because of this, the signs that each person puts down can change, and the final numbers can end up far from what any one person first thought.

Another reason is that the way we add the signs can change the story we tell. If we simply count each good sign as one and each bad sign as one, we lose the sense that some good things may be bigger or more important than others. Some people will try to give a bigger count to the big good things, while others will keep every count the same. This makes the final numbers look different as the way changes.

People will say many things about why this is not easy. Some will say that the hardest part is that we cannot see all the good and bad parts at once, so we have to guess about the ones we do not see. Others will say that the hardest part is that each person brings a different view, so the signs they put down are not the same. Still others will say that the hardest part is that the way we add the signs can hide the real size of the good and bad parts.

In the end, the ask is not just to make a number of good and a number of bad, but to think about how we see each part, how we decide what counts as good or bad, and how we add them up. The many replies show that the easy act of making a count can turn into a deep look at how we see the world and how we try to put that view into a simple number.

english_query: how we come to trust what other people tell us
ugf_response: First, we look at how we know if a thing is true. We see it with our eyes or feel it with our hands. This makes us feel sure about that thing. Second, we see that other people say the same thing that we see. When many people say the same thing, we start to think they might be right. Third, we look at the person who is talking to us. We ask if this person knows a lot about the thing they are saying. We also ask if this person wants us to believe them so they can get something for themselves. If the person has no reason to lie and they know much about the thing, we feel more sure. The thing after the third thing, we see if what they say is like what we already know to be true. If what they say is the same as what we know, we believe it more easily. If it is something very strange and new, we wait and look for more signs. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we look at the way they speak. If they seem to be telling the truth and do not change their story, we feel we can trust their words. Finally, we put all these things together to decide if we will believe what they say.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
Think about how you see the world. You have many things that you think are true in your mind. These things are like a set of glasses that you always wear. Because you wear these glasses, you do not see the world as it is. Instead, you see the world through what you already know and what you already believe.

First, let us look at how your mind works when it sees something new. When a new thing comes to you, your mind does not start from nothing. Instead, it looks at the new thing and tries to put it into a place that you already have in your mind. If the new thing fits with what you already believe, your mind says, yes, this makes sense. It feels good because it does not change what you thought before.

Second, if the new thing does not fit with what you believe, your mind feels a kind of pain or bad feeling. This is because the new thing says that what you thought was true might not be true. This makes your mind feel as if it is in a place where bad things might happen. To stop this bad feeling, your mind will try to change how it sees the new thing. It might say the new thing is wrong. It might say the new thing is not important. It might even say the person who brought the new thing is not telling the truth.

Third, this means that you are not seeing the world in a way that is the very same for everyone. Two people can look at the very same thing and see two different things. One person sees something that fits their mind, so they think it is true. The other person sees something that does not fit their mind, so they think it is not true.

In the end, what you believe acts like a way to sort things. It helps you decide what is good and what is bad, or what is true and what is not true. But because of this, it is very hard to see the real world without letting your old thoughts change what you see. To see better, you must try to take off your glasses and look at things without thinking about what you already know.

english_query: why following rules is not enough if you do not care about people
ugf_response:
The person is telling us something about how we act. The first idea is that there are ways of acting that are set down for us to follow. These are the ways we are told we must act. The second idea is that some people do not care about the well being or the feelings of other people. The third idea is that if you only follow these ways of acting but you do not care about other people, you are not doing what is right.

The person thinks that if you only do what you are told to do, you might still do things that are bad. They think that if you do not have care for others in your heart, then just following the ways of acting is not enough to make you a good person. They think that the good way to live must have both following the ways of acting and caring for the people around you.

We must look at if this way of thinking is good. The first part is true. It is true that there are ways of acting that we follow. It is also true that some people do not care about others. However, we must ask if the way they put these things together is right. If a person follows every way of acting but does not care about people, they might still do things that cause hurt. This is because the ways of acting cannot tell you what to do in every single moment. Sometimes the ways of acting are not enough to stop bad things from happening. For this reason, the person is right to say that caring for people is a thing that must be added to the ways of acting. The way they think is good because it shows that being good is more than just doing what you are told.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we must think about why we act well toward other people. We think about how we want other people to act toward us. If we do not want someone to hurt us or take our things, we must not do those things to them. Second, we must think about the way people feel. Every person has a mind that can feel pain or a feeling of being not happy. If we do something to make someone feel great pain, we are doing something that is not good. Third, we can see that if everyone did bad things to everyone else, the world would be a place of fear and no one could live in a way that is quiet and good. If we want to live in a world where we are safe, we must all agree to not do certain bad things. The thing after the third thing, we can see that some things are so bad that they break the way we live together. For one thing, taking a life or making someone work for another person without their choice is so bad that it makes it so people cannot be free or happy. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we can say that because we are all the same kind of living thing with the same need to be safe and happy, we must have some things that we never do. We do these things because if we do not, we end the very thing that makes us able to live together as people.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
First, the first idea says that you can see some signs or small signs about what another person might do. Those signs can be things like the way they act, the words they say, or the things they have done before. This part is true because we all notice that people give out signs all the time, even if they do not try to.

Second, the second idea says that from those signs you can guess what the other person will do next. It says that if you see a sign, you can think about what it means and then make a guess about the next move of that person. This is the step that moves from the first idea to a new thought.

Third, the third idea says that because you have that guess, you should change the way you do your own thing. It says that you should wait, hurry, or do something else so that your own thing you do fits with the guess you have made about the other person.

Now look at whether the thinking is good. The part that says you can see signs is strong, so the start of the thought line is on a still ground. The part that says you can turn those signs into a guess can help, but it is not always safe. A sign can be not clear, and a guess can be wrong. When a guess is wrong, the last idea – to change your own thing you do resting on that guess – can lead you to do the wrong thing. So the whole line works well only when the guess is close to what will really happen. If you are not sure, it may be better to keep your own plan simple and be ready to change it later, rather than to move early because of a guess that might be off.

In short, the say that signs are there is true, the say that signs lead to a guess makes sense, and the say that you should do something resting on that guess can be good when the guess is right but can be bad when the guess is wrong. How good the thinking is is about how well you can read the signs and how certain you are about the guess before you change your own thing you do.

english_query: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
ugf_response:
First, we think about what it means to be a good person. A good person tries to do things that give help to other people and does not do things that hurt them. A good person also tries to be kind and to act toward people in the same way and to keep promises. When you try to do these things, you start to feel good inside and other people also feel good around you. That feeling of good inside and the feeling of other people being safe and happy is what many people call a good life.  

Second, we look at how a good life feels. A good life is not just about having a lot of stuff or money. It is more about feeling that your days have a sense and that you can look at the world and see that you have made a small part of it better. It is also about having friends and family that you can trust and that you can trust back. When you act in a kind way, you make more time for these friends to grow.  

Third, we think about how to stay being this kind of person. This means checking each day if you have done something that hurts or gives help. If you see a hurt, you try to fix it or say sorry. If you see a time to give help, you take it. You also try to listen to other people and to put yourself in their place so you can see what they need.  

Finally, when you keep doing these things, the feeling of good inside and the feeling of other people being safe and happy keep growing. This makes you feel that you are living a good life. In short, living a good life by being a good person is about trying each day to be kind, to act toward people in the same way, and to give help, and letting that shape how you feel and how the world around you feels.

english_query: how to pick the best reason out of many that could be right
ugf_response: When you have more than one why that may be right you need a way to find the most good why. First put the why one then the next then the next so you can see them all. Then look at what you see as right about each why. See if each why works with the what you see. The why that works with the most what you see is more good. Also see which why makes you feel most good when you think about it. The why that also works with other why that you already know are good is even more good. Then take the why that is most good and that feels right. After you take it you can look again at what you see and be ready to change if a new why works better. This way you can step by step find the most good why out of many that may be right.
